/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libarm_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/arm_msgs/libarm_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/arm_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/arm_msgs/msg/_arm_joint_s.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/arm_msgs/msg/_arm_joints_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pawan/yahboomcar_ws/build/arm_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libarm_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libarm_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
